title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo – lightweight, extensible framework for getting and running LLMs locally with a simple CLI and REST API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, list models with idiomatic async/sync calls.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same generate/chat API surface as Python.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain adapter to use Ollama models for chat, completion, embeddings and tool calling.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama (now renamed “Open WebUI”) with multi-user, RAG, plugins.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; fluent builder API, streaming, embeddings, tools, Android compatible.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive CLI wrapper that adds conversation history, prompt templates and markdown rendering.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-mode plugin for VS Code that uses Ollama models for inline suggestions.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to run Ollama models as generators or embedders in production pipelines.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store + LangChain in a single notebook.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that lets servers chat with any Ollama model via slash commands.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: n8n community node to integrate Ollama chat/completion into no-code automation workflows.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU & PVC support.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger SDK module that exposes Ollama as a CI/CD pipeline service for testing LLM flows.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing async bindings to the Ollama REST API with serde types.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with async streaming, embeddings, and tool calling; NuGet package available.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot that spins up an Ollama instance and answers @-mentions in channels or DMs.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir wrapper around Ollama HTTP API with Finch/Tesla clients and LiveView hooks.

title: ollama-rag-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that builds a local vector index of your vault and lets you query it via Ollama.

title: ollama-models
summary: Community-curated registry of GGUF model definitions (Modelfiles) ready for ollama pull.
